text:
List of Acts
Constitution of India; Telangana Medical & Dental Colleges 
Admission (Admission into MBBS and BDS Courses) Rules, 
2017; Andhra Pradesh Educational Institutions (Regulations of 
Admissions) Order, 1974; Andhra Pradesh Educational Institutions 
(Regulation of Admissions) Second Amendment Order, 1976; 
Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2014; Telangana Educational 
Institutions (Regulation of Admission and Prohibition of Capitation 
Fee), Act, 1983; Constitution of India.
